scope.summary: Persist every observed conversation, message, and attachment metadata into the SQLite store (ADR-0005) so chat history survives restarts and Zalo-side message loss. The store/ layer gains thread/message/attachment repositories; the command layer persists on listener ingest and on send, and exposes a history-load path; the frontend hydrates threads + messages from the DB at login/restore so the conversation list is no longer empty until a realtime message arrives.
goals: store/: save_message (upsert thread + insert message, dedupe by (account_id,msg_id)), save_attachment, load_threads, load_messages(thread,limit); rusqlite confined to store
command/: persist incoming messages (listener bridge) and outgoing sends; load_history command returns persisted threads + recent messages for an account
types/: StoredThread + StoredMessage DTOs (camelCase) returned to the UI
Frontend hydrates conversations + thread messages from load_history at login/restore; realtime messages continue to append and persist
nonGoals: Downloading attachment binaries to disk (store URL + metadata only this slice)
Backfilling history that predates first login (no upstream recent-conversations/1:1 history API)

acceptance.description: store/ round-trips a thread + messages: save_message persists and dedupes; load_threads/load_messages return them ordered; attachment metadata persists.
command/ persists incoming + outgoing messages and load_history returns persisted threads/messages; compiles with no token values across IPC.
Frontend builds and hydrates the conversation list + active thread from persisted history at login/restore.
Live/manual: a received/sent message is written to SQLite; relaunch shows the thread + message history without a new realtime event. Evidence captures only non-secret diagnostics.
